caption: A football video game interface displays a defensive play-selection screen during a game. The top of the screen shows game stats, including "3rd & 4" and a clock at "0:54 33 .29". A banner reads "HOLD-THE LINE ENABLED!". A man with blonde hair wearing a blue shirt and a headset is visible in a small picture-in-picture window on the left. The main screen features a "SELECT A PLAY" menu with options like "COACH SUGGESTIONS", "FORMATION", and "RECENT PLAYS". As the sequence progresses, the user navigates through defensive schemes. Initial frames highlight "COVER 4 QUARTERS" with a diagram of player positions. Later frames show the selection shifting to other plays, including "PINCH BUCK 0" and "COVER 1 HOLE". The background shows a virtual stadium filled with spectators under a dark sky, and a "PREVIOUS PLAY" summary mentions "COVER 4 QUARTERS" and "FK SLOT CROSS".
